si.t: Check out my checklist for Weapons, Spells, & Ashes!
There is a total of 165 Bosses (Bossfights)
Check out my checklist for Armor, Key Items, & More!
Make sure to make your own copy by selecting File.
Don't request access to edit please.
Elder Dragon Greyoll (Caelid) is not a boss, but is on here

r.t: 👑Radagon of the Golden Order / Elden Beast*!

si.t: If you are viewing this from a computer, and would like to make your own copy. So you can check the boxes off yourself. Then click "File" in the top left hand corner of the screen. Next, select "Make a copy" and select "Ok". You now have your own copy of the checklist to edit.

If you are viewing this from a phone, and would like to make your own copy so you can check the boxes off yourself. Tap the three dots in the top right hand corner of your screen. Next, tap "Share & export". Then select "Make a copy" and select "Ok". You now have your own copy.

If you would like to show a little thanks, I have a Steam Elden Ring Guide titled "Elden Ring Boss Checklist" by Summoner000. You can give that a thumbs up or maybe an award if you deem it worthy of one. Thank you for viewing, copying, and sharing my work!
There are a total of 28 Invaders
Please Comment any corrections. Share with your friends!
💰Nomadic Merchant Shop (Liurnia of the Lakes Central)
Orange text weapons are Legendary, Blue text weapons are Remembrances

r.t: weapons are Unique and require Somber Smithing Stones

si.t: There is a total of 378 Weapons on this list
Please comment any corrections and remember to share with your friends!
Make your own copy of this checklist by selecting "File" and "Make a copy".
Check out my checklist for all the Bosses and Invaders in Elden Ring!
Also check out my checklist for Armor, Key Items, and more!
If you would like to show a little thanks, I have a Steam Elden Ring Guide titled
"Elden Ring Weapons, Spells, & Ashes Checklist" on Steam. There you can give it a
Thumbs up or an award if you deem it worthy of one. Thanks for sharing my work!
💰Nomadic Merchant Shop (Liurnia of the Lakes South)
💎Remembrance of the Full Moon Queen option
💀Ancient Hero of Zamor (Giant Conquering Hero's Grave)
💀Night's Cavalry Drop (North Liurnia of the Lakes)
Orange text Sorceries and Incantations are Legendary, Blue are Remembrances
There is a total of 69 Sorceries and 101 Incantations on this list (170 together).
💰Royal House Scroll Unlock (Sorceress Sellen or Miriel)
💰Dragon Altar, Borealis the Freezing Fog Slain
💀Death Rite Bird Drop (Liurnia of the Lakes)
💰Dragon Altar, Magma Wyrm Slain (Lava Pool, Mt. Gelmir)
💰Ancient Dragon Prayerbook Unlock (Brother Corhyn or Miriel)
💰Dragon Cult Prayerbook Unlock (Brother Corhyn or Miriel)
🌱Tower in Caelid (near Church of the Plague)
💰Fire Monks Prayerbook Unlock (Brother Corhyn or Miriel)
💰Golden Order Principia Unlock (Brother Corhyn or Miriel)
💰Two Fingers Prayerbook Unlock (Brother Corhyn or Miriel)
Blue text Ashes of War are Remembrances
There is a total of 91 Ashes of War. 90 if you don't include "No Skill".
Use Lost Ashes to duplicate Ashes of War at the Blacksmith.
💀Night's Cavalry (Weeping Peninsula), Bloodhound Knight Darriwil Drop
💰Knight Bernahl Shop, 💀Grave Warden Duelist Drop (Murkwater Catacombs)
💀Night's Cavalry Drop (North Liurnia), 🦴Troll Knight Drop (Northeast Liurnia)
Orange text Spirit Ashes are Legendary
💀Ancient Hero of Zamor Drop (Sainted Hero's Grave)
There are 42 Normal Ashes, and 22 Unique Ashes, making 64 Ashes Total.
You can't get both of the Nepheli Loux and Dung Eater Puppets in one playthrough.
Puppets are bought from Preceptor Seluvis with Starlight Shards.
💀Erdtree Burial Watchdog Duo Drop (Minor Erdtree Catacombs)
There is a total of 154 Head-wear pieces, 136 Torso-wear pieces, 104 Leg-wear pieces, and
90 Hand-wear pieces. Making a total of 484 Armor Pieces.
Dont request access to edit please.
💰Enia Shop (Rennalla, Queen of the Full Moon Defeated)
Also check out my checklist for Weapons, Spells, and Ashes!
"Elden Ring Armor, Talismans, & Key Items Checklist" on Steam. There you can give it a
💀Ancient Hero of Zamor Drop (Giant Conquering Hero's Grave)
💀Putrid Grave Warden Duelist Drop (Consecrated Snowfield Catacombs)
💀Sir Gideon Ofnir, The All Knowing Drop
💰Enia Shop (Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree Defeated)
💀Crucible Knight Ordovis Drop, 💀Crucible Knight Siluria Drop
Restore 20% More Health Points from Crimson Flasks
Orange text talismans are Legendary, Blue text talismans are Remembrances
Restores 20% More Focus Points from Cerulean Flasks
There is a total of 115 Talismans on this list.
Raises Stamina Recovery Speed by 8 Points per Second
There is a Talisman that was never added to the game called "Entwining Umbilical Cord".
You can't get both the Warrior Jar Shard and the Shard of Alexander in the same playthrough
You can't get both the Millicent's Prosthesis and the Rotten Winged Sword Isignia in the same playthrough
Raises Health Points by 3%, Stamina by 6.75%, and Equip Load by 5%
Raises Health Points by 3.5%, Stamina by 8.25%, and Equip Load by 6.5%
Raises Health Points by 4%, Stamina by 9.6%, and Equip Load by 8%
Raises Vigor, Endurance, Strength, and Dexterity by 3, take 10% increased damage
Raises Vigor, Endurance, Strength, and Dexterity by 5, take 15% increased damage
Raises Mind, Intelligence, Faith, and Arcane by 3, take 10% Increased damage
Raises Mind, Intelligence, Faith, and Arcane by 5, take 15% Increased damage
Reduces damage from Physical attacks by 10%
Reduces damage from Physical attacks by 13%
Reduces damage from Physical attacks by 17%
Reduces damage from Physical attacks by 20%
Reduces damage from Magic attacks by 13%
Reduces damage from Magic attacks by 17%
Reduces damage from Magic attacks by 20%
Reduces damage from Fire attacks by 13%
Reduces damage from Fire attacks by 17%
Reduces damage from Fire attacks by 20%
Reduces damage from Lightning attacks by 13%
Reduces damage from Lightning attacks by 17%
Reduces damage from Lightning attacks by 20%
Reduces damage from Holy attacks by 13%
Reduces damage from Holy attacks by 17%
Reduces damage from Holy attacks by 20%
Reduces damage from Non-Physical attacks by 5%
Reduces damage from Non-Physical attacks by 7%
Reduces damage from Non-Physical attacks by 9%
Raises Immunity, Robustness, and Focus by 40
Raises Immunity, Robustness, and Focus by 60
20% Increased Damage of Final Hit in Chain Attacks
10% Decreased Stamina Damage taken when Blocking
Increases Arrow & Bolt travel distance, and Decreases their Damage Fall-off
Reduces Spell FP Cost by 25%, and Decreases Maximum HP by 15%
Increases the Duration of Spells by 30%
Raises Dexterity by 30 (Virtually) exclusively for the Spell Casting Speed increase
15% Increased Damage with Charged Skills and Spells
Increases Physical Damage Scaling with very low Equip Loads
12% Increased Magic Damage, take 10% Increased Damage
12% Increased Fire Damage, take 10% Increased Damage
12% Increased Lightning Damage, take 10% Increased Damage
12% Increased Holy Damage, take 10% Increased Damage
30% Decreased Damage taken from Critical Strikes
Increases Invincibility Frames of Dodge Rolls, but take 30% Increased Damage
Reduces Damage and Impact when hit in the head
20% Increased Damage when below 20% Maximum Health Points
50% Decreased Damage taken when below 20% Maximum Health Points
10% Increased Damage when at 100% Maximum Health Points
30% Decreased Damage taken when at 100% Maximum Health Points
Restores 10% of Maximum HP + 85 HP when a Crititcal Strike is performed
Restores 15 FP when a Critical Strike is performed
Raises Dexterity by 5, Increased Damage with Successive hits (4%, 6%, 11%, 18%)
Restores 3% of Maximum HP + 30 HP on the 3rd through 7th hits in Successive hits
20% Increased Damage for 20 Seconds when you or others get poison or scarlet rot
20% Increased Damage for 20 Seconds when you or others get blood loss
Restores 3% of Maximum HP + 30 HP on Kill
Eliminates sound made by the wearer's movements
Conceals the wearer when crouched away from foes
Take on the appearance of the Host of Fingers
Take on the appearance of a Cooperator
Will be lost on Death instead of Runes

r.t: = Cannot be obtained again in New Game +
= Will be removed upon starting New Game +

si.t: 📜Given by Renna at Church of Elleh
🌱A small island in Liurnia of the Lakes
Some items may be unobtainable in a playthrough after certain points in the game.
Obtaining Golden Seed #5, prevents obtaining Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone #1 and #2.
Obtaining NPC Bell Bearings may ruin quests, and ruin chances to obtain some items.
For the Quest Items, just check it off if you have ever obtained it. You lose them through progression.
The Checklist displays 44 Golden Seeds, but you only need 30 to max out your flask count.
You will lose some of these items if you start another Playthrough after beating the game.
** These Cracked Pots cannot be obtained if you chose the Cracked Pot as your Starting Keepsake.
📜Given by Enia after obtaining 2 Great Runes
💀Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon Drop
Mending Rune of the Death Prince
Mending Rune of the Fell Curse
🌱First Church of Marika (Mountaintops of the Giants)
🌱First Step Message after slayed a Demigod
🦴Ulcerated Tree Spirit Drop (Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree)
🌱Fire Monk camp near Church of Vows
💰Pre-Ordering the game, or 💀beating a boss with someone who did
📜Befriend Patches, let him beat you to low HP, Grovel for Mercy
📜Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree, Millicent Questline
🦴Disguised Silver Tear (Limgrave, Wandering Noble into Rune Bear)
🦴Disguised Silver Tear (Liurnia, Giant Lobster into Grafted Scion)
🦴Disguised Silver Tear (Caelid, Wandering Noble into Troll)
🦴Disguised Silver Tear (Altus, Wandering Noble into Lion Guardian)
🦴Disguised Silver Tear (Snowfields, Wandering Noble into Rune Bear)
📜Irina & Edgar Questline, 🦴Edgar Drop, 💀Edgar The Revenger Drop
📜Given by Ranni after giving Fingerslayer Blade
📜Given by Fia after arrival at Altus Plateau
📜Given by Patches at Shaded Castle after Rykard
📜White Faced Varre Questline, Church of Inhibition or Chapel of Anticipation
📜Given by Melina after Morgott is defeated
📜Given by Albus in the Village of Albinaurics
📜Given by Dung Eater after arrival in Leyndell
Walking Mausoleums allow you to duplicate Remembrances. But only one Remembrance per Mausoleum per Playthrough.
The two Mausoleums in the Mausoleum Compound that don't have bells under them don't let you copy 💎Shardbearer Remembrances.
The Mausoleums with a bell under them let you copy any of the 15 Remembrances.
There are 7 Mausoleums, so you can only duplicate 7 Remembrances per playthrough. Only 5 can be 💎Shardbearer Remembrances.
Use the Mausoleum Checklist to remember which Mausoleums you have already used in that playthrough.
Remembrances can be duplicated even if you have already traded it in for a reward.
Remembrances drop from important bosses and can be traded to Enia at the Roundtable for one of two rewards as listed above.
You can only get both rewards if you either duplicate your remembrance at a Mausoleum or obtain another in new game +.
If you have obtained both rewards or don't want some options, you can sell the remembrances for lots of runes. View graph below.
Use this checklist to remember which options you have chosen in case you want to collect everything.
Remembrance of the Full Moon Queen
